typography.notes: Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for headings. Inter for body text with normal tracking. Banned: Inter for headings. Banned: Space Grotesk.

colors.rules: Tinted Grey Rule: Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Always tint neutral greys slightly. Banned: Teal green/blue (#1B93A4) for dashboards. Banned: Purple-blue gradients.

layout.grid: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-4 or gap-6)
layout.spacing: Dense and compact padding (p-4 or p-6) for data-heavy dashboard cards.
layout.surfaces: Grid Borders or Flat Backgrounds. Avoid heavy glassmorphism for health/maintenance apps; prefer flat solid surfaces with 1px borders.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI heavily customized with strict 1px borders and minimal border radius (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Do not overuse the default 'Card' look. Go for a cardless, dense style.
components.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts) for Pareto, MTTR, MTBF.

images.description: Abstract geometric industrial background, minimalist, high contrast, clean and professional. Use for authentication/login screens.
Empty modern warehouse interior with polished concrete floor. Use for empty states, landing pages, or organization creation screens.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA or WCAG AA standards against all backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Must have HIGHER contrast than default state (e.g., focus:ring-2).
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid="login-submit-button").

instructions_to_main_agent: Import 'Outfit' and 'Inter' from Google Fonts and set them up in tailwind.config.js.
Apply 'Control Room' grid rules to Dashboard KPIs and feature cards.
Implement light and dark mode toggling across the entire SaaS.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, and customized Shadcn for interactive logic.
Avoid the standard 'Bootstrap' or 'Default Vercel' look. Opt for a Swiss Brutalist/High-Contrast aesthetic.
Ensure 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' is strictly used instead of default large radii.
Follow 'Grid Borders' style for data tables, lists, and forms.
Ensure navigation links are visible on desktop (no hidden hamburger menus).
Always use data-testid for buttons, inputs, links, forms.
Do not use transparent backgrounds for sticky headers; use solid or blurred solid backgrounds.
Limit the use of primary colors to main CTAs and active states only.
